headline: Valero Energy Weighs Refining Strength Against Energy Transition Opportunities
summary: Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) is advancing its renewable diesel and sustainable aviation fuel businesses, positioning itself within the energy transition. The company recently approved a dividend increase and is pursuing operational projects that include a major refinery optimization effort. Valero is set to benefit from new tax credits and the resumption of Venezuelan crude imports, which affect its feedstock mix and economics. Valero Energy, trading at $225.6, has seen its share price move...
